name: Blockchain AI MCP
description: Web3/crypto toolkit: wallet analysis, transaction tracing, smart contract auditing, gas estimation, and token metadata. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: wallet_analyzer
tools.description: Analyze an Ethereum wallet's transaction history, portfolio, and risk profile.

tools.name: transaction_tracer
tools.description: Trace a transaction's full execution path including internal calls

tools.name: smart_contract_auditor
tools.description: Audit Solidity smart contract source code for common vulnerabilities

tools.name: gas_estimator
tools.description: Estimate gas costs for common blockchain operations with priority-based

tools.name: token_metadata
tools.description: Analyze token metadata including supply distribution, holder concentration,
